revision.text:
'''丁卯'''（ひのとう、ていぼう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて4番目で、前は[[丙寅]]、次は[[戊辰]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は火、[[十二支]]の五行は木で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（木生火）である。
==丁卯の年==
==丁卯の日== ===[[選日]]===

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings
revision.text: #redirect[[en:丁卯]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

{{干支}} '''丁卯'''（ひのとう、ていぼう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。 [[甲子]]から数えて4番目で、前は[[丙寅]]、次は[[戊辰]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は火、[[十二支]]の五行は木で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（木生火）である。 ==丁卯の年==
*‥‥ *[[1927年]] *[[1807年]] *[[1987年]] *[[1867年]] *‥‥
==丁卯の月==
*‥‥ *[[1984年]]3月 *[[1999年]]3月 *[[1974年]]3月 *[[1989年]]3月 *[[2004年]]3月 *[[1979年]]3月 *[[1994年]]3月 *‥‥
==丁卯の日== [[Category:干支|ひのとう]] [[ko:정묘]] [[zh:丁卯]]

Adding [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Otheruseslist|十干十二支の丁卯|日本海軍軍艦もしくは長州藩の丁卯丸|第一丁卯|もう一隻の日本海軍軍艦|第二丁卯}} {{干支}} '''丁卯'''（ひのとう、ていかのう、ていかのうさぎ、ていぼう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの4番目で、前は[[丙寅]]、次は[[戊辰]]である。
[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[丁]]は陰の[[火]]、[[十二支]]の[[卯]]は陰の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（木生火）である。
==丁卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って7が余る年が丁卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''丁卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[7年]] *[[67年]] *[[127年]] *[[187年]] *[[247年]] *[[307年]] *[[367年]] *[[427年]] *[[487年]] *[[547年]] *[[607年]] *[[667年]] *[[727年]] *[[787年]] *[[847年]] *[[907年]] *[[967年]] | *[[1027年]] *[[1087年]] *[[1147年]] *[[1207年]] *[[1267年]] *[[1327年]] *[[1387年]] *[[1447年]] *[[1507年]] *[[1567年]] *[[1627年]] *[[1687年]] *[[1747年]] *[[1807年]] *[[1867年]] *[[1927年]] *[[1987年]] | *[[2047年]] *[[2107年]] *[[2167年]] *[[2227年]] *[[2287年]] *[[2347年]] *[[2407年]] *[[2467年]] *[[2527年]] *[[2587年]] *[[2647年]] *[[2707年]] *[[2767年]] *[[2827年]] *[[2887年]] *[[2947年]] |}
==丁卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[2月]]が丁卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==丁卯の日== ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:丁卯]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:丁卯]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rabbit|kanji=丁卯|romaji=hinoto usagi|onyomi=tei bō|p=dīngmǎo|w=ting-mao|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=deng1 maau5|j=deng1 maau5|ci=tɛŋ maːu̯²|mc=tæŋ mawX|oc-bs=tæŋ mruʔ}} {{Otheruseslist|十干十二支の丁卯|日本海軍軍艦もしくは長州藩の丁卯丸|第一丁卯|もう一隻の日本海軍軍艦|第二丁卯}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Fire Rabbit also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 丁卯'''（ひのとう、ていかのう、ていかのうさぎ、ていぼう）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの4番目で、前は[[丙寅]]、次は[[戊辰]]である。
[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[丁]]は陰の[[火]]、[[十二支]]の[[卯]]は陰の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（木生火）である。
==丁卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って7が余る年が丁卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''丁卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[7年]] *[[67年]] *[[127年]] *[[187年]] *[[247年]] *[[307年]] *[[367年]] *[[427年]] *[[487年]] *[[547年]] *[[607年]] *[[667年]] *[[727年]] *[[787年]] *[[847年]] *[[907年]] *[[967年]] | *[[1027年]] *[[1087年]] *[[1147年]] *[[1207年]] *[[1267年]] *[[1327年]] *[[1387年]] *[[1447年]] *[[1507年]] *[[1567年]] *[[1627年]] *[[1687年]] *[[1747年]] *[[1807年]] *[[1867年]] *[[1927年]] *[[1987年]] | *[[2047年]] *[[2107年]] *[[2167年]] *[[2227年]] *[[2287年]] *[[2347年]] *[[2407年]] *[[2467年]] *[[2527年]] *[[2587年]] *[[2647年]] *[[2707年]] *[[2767年]] *[[2827年]] *[[2887年]] *[[2947年]] |}
==丁卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[2月]]が丁卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rabbit|kanji=丁卯|romaji=hinoto usagi|onyomi=tei bō|p=dīngmǎo|w=ting-mao|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=deng1 maau5|j=deng1 maau5|ci=tɛŋ maːu̯²|mc=tæŋ mawX|oc-bs=tæŋ mruʔ}} {{Otheruseslist|十干十二支の丁卯|日本海軍軍艦もしくは長州藩の丁卯丸|第一丁卯|もう一隻の日本海軍軍艦|第二丁卯}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Fire Rabbit also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 丁卯'''（ひのとう、ていかのう、ていかのうさぎ、ていぼう）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの4番目で、前は[[丙寅]]、次は[[戊辰]]である。
[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[丁]]は陰の[[火]]、[[十二支]]の[[卯]]は陰の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（木生火）である。

==丁卯の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って7が余る年が丁卯の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''丁卯の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[7年]] *[[67年]] *[[127年]] *[[187年]] *[[247年]] *[[307年]] *[[367年]] *[[427年]] *[[487年]] *[[547年]] *[[607年]] *[[667年]] *[[727年]] *[[787年]] *[[847年]] *[[907年]] *[[967年]] | *[[1027年]] *[[1087年]] *[[1147年]] *[[1207年]] *[[1267年]] *[[1327年]] *[[1387年]] *[[1447年]] *[[1507年]] *[[1567年]] *[[1627年]] *[[1687年]] *[[1747年]] *[[1807年]] *[[1867年]] *[[1927年]] *[[1987年]] | *[[2047年]] *[[2107年]] *[[2167年]] *[[2227年]] *[[2287年]] *[[2347年]] *[[2407年]] *[[2467年]] *[[2527年]] *[[2587年]] *[[2647年]] *[[2707年]] *[[2767年]] *[[2827年]] *[[2887年]] *[[2947年]] |}
==丁卯の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[2月]]が丁卯の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[啓蟄]]から[[清明]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==丁卯の日==

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rabbit|kanji=丁卯|romaji=hinoto usagi|onyomi=tei bō|p=dīngmǎo|w=ting-mao|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=deng1 maau5|j=deng1 maau5|ci=tɛŋ maːu̯²|mc=tæŋ mawX|oc-bs=tæŋ mruʔ|qq=}} {{Otheruseslist|十干十二支の丁卯|日本海軍軍艦もしくはChōshū Domainの丁卯丸|第一丁卯|もう一隻の日本海軍軍艦|第二丁卯|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Rabbit also known as 丁卯''' (hinotou, teika nou, teika nousagi, teibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol {{ill|Rabbit|ja|卯|1=Rabbit (Zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=}}, forming a generating relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood gives rise to Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Teika-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: teibou ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmyo (정묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão
<!-- == * Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: ひのとう (hino-tō) ***Onyomi: ていかのうさぎ (teika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: ていぼう (teibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeongmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Fire Rabbit== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 7 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯)'s years table''' |- ! ==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rabbit==

It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (Zodiac)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=}}, forming a generating relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood gives rise to Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Teika-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: teibou ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmyo (정묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão
<!-- == * Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: ひのとう (hino-tō) ***Onyomi: ていかのうさぎ (teika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: ていぼう (teibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeongmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Teika-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: teibou ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmyo (정묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão

==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. ==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061999]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rabbit|kanji=丁卯|romaji=hinoto usagi|onyomi=tei bō|p=dīngmǎo|w=ting-mao|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=deng1 maau5|j=deng1 maau5|ci=tɛŋ maːu̯²|mc=tæŋ mawX|oc-bs=tæŋ mruʔ|qq=}} {{Otheruseslist|十干十二支の丁卯|日本海軍軍艦もしくはChōshū Domainの丁卯丸|第一丁卯|もう一隻の日本海軍軍艦|第二丁卯|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Rabbit also known as 丁卯''' (hinotou, teika nou, teika nousagi, teibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支}}.
It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo invalid}}, forming a generating relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|qq=}}) (i.e. Wood gives rise to Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Teika-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: teibou ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmyo (정묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão
<!-- == * Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: ひのとう (hino-tō) ***Onyomi: ていかのうさぎ (teika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: ていぼう (teibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeongmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Fire Rabbit== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 7 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯)'s years table''' |- ! ==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rabbit==

==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061999]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rabbit|kanji=丁卯|romaji=hinoto usagi|onyomi=tei bō|p=dīngmǎo|w=ting-mao|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=deng1 maau5|j=deng1 maau5|ci=tɛŋ maːu̯²|mc=tæŋ mawX|oc-bs=tæŋ mruʔ|qq=}} {{Otheruseslist|十干十二支の丁卯|日本海軍軍艦もしくはChōshū Domainの丁卯丸|第一丁卯|もう一隻の日本海軍軍艦|第二丁卯|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Rabbit also known as 丁卯''' (hinotou, teika nou, teika nousagi, teibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo ==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061999]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rabbit|kanji=丁卯|romaji=hinoto usagi|onyomi=tei bō|p=dīngmǎo|w=ting-mao|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=deng1 maau5|j=deng1 maau5|ci=tɛŋ maːu̯²|mc=tæŋ mawX|oc-bs=tæŋ mruʔ|qq=}} {{Otheruseslist|十干十二支の丁卯|日本海軍軍艦もしくはChōshū Domainの丁卯丸|第一丁卯|もう一隻の日本海軍軍艦|第二丁卯|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Rabbit also known as 丁卯''' (hinotou, teika nou, teika nousagi, teibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol {{ill|Rabbit|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061999]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rabbit|kanji=丁卯|romaji=hinoto usagi|onyomi=tei bō|p=dīngmǎo|w=ting-mao|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=deng1 maau5|j=deng1 maau5|ci=tɛŋ maːu̯²|mc=tæŋ mawX|oc-bs=tæŋ mruʔ|qq=}} {{Otheruseslist|十干十二支の丁卯|日本海軍軍艦もしくはChōshū Domainの丁卯丸|第一丁卯|もう一隻の日本海軍軍艦|第二丁卯|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Rabbit also known as 丁卯''' (hinotou, teika nou, teika nousagi, teibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol {{ill|Rabbit|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu (木)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a generating relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Wood gives rise to Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Teika-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: teibou ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmyo (정묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão
<!-- == * Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: ひのとう (hino-tō) ***Onyomi: ていかのうさぎ (teika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: ていぼう (teibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeongmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão

It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Teika-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: teibou ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmyo (정묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão
<!-- == * Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: ひのとう (hino-tō) ***Onyomi: ていかのうさぎ (teika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: ていぼう (teibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeongmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão

==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. ==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Teika-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: teibou ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmyo (정묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão

==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly ==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-māu]][[de:Feuer-Hase]][[fr:Lièvre de feu]][[hak:Tên-mâu]][[ja:丁卯]][[ko:정묘]][[nds:Füür-Haas]][[vi:Đinh Mão]][[za:Dingmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-báu]][[zh-yue:丁卯]][[zh:丁卯]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061999]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rabbit|kanji=丁卯|romaji=hinoto usagi|onyomi=tei bō|p=dīngmǎo|w=ting-mao|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=deng1 maau5|j=deng1 maau5|ci=tɛŋ maːu̯²|mc=tæŋ mawX|oc-bs=tæŋ mruʔ|qq=}} {{Otheruseslist|十干十二支の丁卯|日本海軍軍艦もしくはChōshū Domainの丁卯丸|第一丁卯|もう一隻の日本海軍軍艦|第二丁卯|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Rabbit also known as 丁卯''' (hinotou, teika nou, teika nousagi, teibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol {{ill|Rabbit|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a generating relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Wood gives rise to Fire).

==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

(i.e. Wood gives rise to Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Teika-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: teibou ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmyo (정묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão
<!-- == * Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: ひのとう (hino-tō) ***Onyomi: ていかのうさぎ (teika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: ていぼう (teibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeongmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão

==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly ==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Teika-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: teibou ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmyo (정묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão

==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Rabbit==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-māu]][[de:Feuer-Hase]][[fr:Lièvre de feu]][[hak:Tên-mâu]][[ja:丁卯]][[ko:정묘]][[nds:Füür-Haas]][[vi:Đinh Mão]][[za:Dingmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-báu]][[zh-yue:丁卯]][[zh:丁卯]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1061999]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Rabbit [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rabbit|kanji=丁卯|romaji=hinoto usagi|onyomi=tei bō|p=dīngmǎo|w=ting-mao|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=deng1 maau5|j=deng1 maau5|ci=tɛŋ maːu̯²|mc=tæŋ mawX|oc-bs=tæŋ mruʔ|qq=}} {{Otheruseslist|十干十二支の丁卯|日本海軍軍艦もしくはChōshū Domainの丁卯丸|第一丁卯|もう一隻の日本海軍軍艦|第二丁卯|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Fire Rabbit also known as 丁卯''' (hinotou, teika nou, teika nousagi, teibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 4th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingyin|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingyin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuchun|ja|戊辰|1=Yang Earth Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuchun|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dragon|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol {{ill|Rabbit|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a generating relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Wood gives rise to Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Teika-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: teibou ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmyo (정묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Teika-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: teibou ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmyo (정묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão
<!-- == * Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: ひのとう (hino-tō) ***Onyomi: ていかのうさぎ (teika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: ていぼう (teibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeongmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão
--> ==Years of Yin Fire Rabbit== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 7 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯)'s years table''' |- ! ==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-u ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-u ***Kunyomi 3: Teika-no-usagi ***Onyomi 1: teibou ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmyo (정묘) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão
<!-- == * Yin Fire Rabbit (丁卯) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngmǎo ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 maau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: ひのとう (hino-tō) ***Onyomi: ていかのうさぎ (teika-no-usagi) ***Onyomi: ていぼう (teibō) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeongmyo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mão

==Months of Yin Fire Rabbit== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:February|February]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teibou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.
